Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to an opponent, draw a card. Then you may cast a spell from your hand with mana value 3 or less without paying its mana cost.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Search your library for a creature card with mana value less than or equal to that of the sacrificed creature, put it into the battlefield, then shuffle.

• This spell deals 4 damage to target creature and 2 damage to you.
• This spell deals 4 damage to target planeswalker and 2 damage to you.
